title: Julabo Presto Thermal Controller
desc: Highly precise temperature control system used for studying phase transitions in bulk fluid volumes. Essential for maintaining strict thermal equilibrium during our liquid crystal analysis.

title: Light Scattering Setup
desc: Custom optical bench setup for light scattering observations. Frequently utilized alongside our 1 mm unaligned cells to probe the optical properties and defect dynamics of soft systems.

title: Micro-Rheology Suite
desc: Advanced particle-tracking setup to measure the viscoelastic properties of hydrogels and colloidal suspensions at a microscopic scale.
